title: Smoky Italian Chicken Wrap
description: A delicious and kid-friendly Italian-inspired wrap filled with smoky chicken and fresh veggies. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a small bowl, whisk together smoky Italian dressing and 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Brush the mixture on both sides of the chicken breast.
Grill the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for a few minutes before slicing.
Warm the tortilla by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the shredded mozzarella cheese on the tortilla, if using.
Add sliced chicken, chopped basil, red onion, cucumber, and cherry tomatoes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Fold the bottom half of the tortilla up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up.
